text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeeeaaaaah! Everyone was so<n>radiant! To!
The! MAX!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
I'm sooo happy I was able to have a<n>serious
match with other<n>Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that, I took first place!I must accept my victory withg-g-g-grace!
choice_data_list: Let's do it again next race too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text: And on top of that, I took first place!I must accept my victory withg-g-g-grace!
choice_data_list: Let's do it again next race too!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Huh? Y-y-y-y-y-you can't mean that!<n>I'm
supposed to be invisible like air...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
You should be focusing on the<n>amazing
performances the other<n>racers put on!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I know that... but... the other<n>runners are far
more incredible than<n>me, no matter how you look
at it. So...

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
It... It just doesn't feel right getting<n>compliments!
You know?

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Right! I'm gonna get much, much<n>stronger so I can
win the next one<n>just like this time!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
And then, the races will keep heating<n>up, and I'll
be right on the frontlines to<n>see my favs in all their
glory!

text_block_list.name: Agnes Digital
text_block_list.text:
Wh-which basically means... there's<n>still more in
store for me! True<n>ecstasy awaits!
